name: agentworkforce-persona-authoring-skills
description: Skills for authoring AgentWorkforce persona JSON specs — mount policy, MCP server configuration, and sidecar fields
author: khaliqgant

packages.name: persona-relayfile-mount
packages.description: Use when authoring an AgentWorkforce persona's `mount` field — covers when to use mount, the gitignore allow-list idiom and its non-obvious `!web` vs `!web/` walker bug, `readonlyPatterns` scope rules, the per-agent dotfile overlay, and `.git` sandbox behavior

packages.name: persona-mcp-servers
packages.description: Use when authoring an AgentWorkforce persona's `mcpServers` field — covers the two spec variants (http/sse vs stdio), `$VAR` secret substitution, the claude/codex/opencode harness support matrix that constrains harness selection, and the `permissions.allow` pairing for `mcp__<server>` tools

packages.name: persona-sidecars
packages.description: Use when authoring an AgentWorkforce persona's sidecar fields (`claudeMd` / `claudeMdContent` / `agentsMd` / `agentsMdContent`) — covers the silent-footgun path-vs-inline distinction the dry-run does NOT catch, which form to pick for local vs built-in personas, and `*Mode` (overwrite vs extend)

packages.name: slack-relayfile-writeback-debugging
packages.description: Use when an outbound Slack writeback (channel/thread/DM) silently fails to deliver — the relayfile ops-API getOp recipe (with the required X-Correlation-Id) to read the persisted lastError, where the Slack error surfaces (NOT the batch consumer logs), the missing_scope/im:write 3-place fix, cf-vs-bridge dispatch, and duplicate/silent-send pitfalls

packages.name: slack-relayfile-readdown-debugging
packages.description: Use when inbound Slack content (channel/thread/DM) doesn't read down to disk or a preview says 'unavailable' — reading mount sync state, write-only-vs-mirror mounts, the bare-vs-suffixed channel-id drop, the preview two-shape gap, mount wedges, and the relayfile#262 backfill trap
